+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current vllm setup",
+        "description": "Verify your vLLM version and configuration:\n```bash\npip show vllm | grep Version\n```\nThis feature requires a working vLLM installation with GPU support."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review vllm configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant vllm configuration:\n### The model to consider.\n\nhttps://huggingface.co/jinaai/jina-embeddings-v3   jina-embeddings-v3 is a multilingual multi-task text embedding model designed for a variety of NLP applications."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [New Model]: jinaai/jina-embeddings-v3",
+        "description": "Apply the changes to add jinaai/jina-embeddings-v3 model support:\n1. jina-embeddings-v3 uses the same weights name as jina-reranker-v2\n2. jina-embeddings-v3 uses rotary position embeddings (not absolute)\n3. Use `is_matryoshka` and `matryoshka_dimensions` to determine whether the model supports matryoshka representations\n4. jina-embeddings-v3 supports five tasks through LoRA adapters (e.g., retrieval.query for queries)\n\nSee the [source PR](https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/16120) for the full implementation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected.\nConfirm the feature described in \"[New Model]: jinaai/jina-embeddings-v3\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Added jinaai/jina-embeddings-v3 model support to vLLM. Key changes: reuses jina-reranker-v2 weight names, uses rotary position embeddings, adds matryoshka representation support, and enables five LoRA-based task adapters.",

+    }
